candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; preferred top-line label and explicitly in candidate list.
Also a valid top-line sales label; useful as fallback if reporting label changes.

variables.notes: Using priority list for revenue label changes over time.

candidates.why: Candidate list entry, but this is a balance sheet inventory-related label and not an income statement expense line for cost of sales.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the correct income statement direct cost row. 'Use of materials and supplies' is the best available COGS-like expense line in the full preview, so selected outside candidates per rule. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Use of materials and supplies

candidates.why: Personnel overhead component; populated and clearly an operating expense.
Share-based compensation is an SG&A-type overhead component and should be included when separately reported.
Broad operating overhead bucket, populated, and appropriate for SG&A coverage excluding D&A and finance items.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears unpopulated in preview.
Administrative-related but non-recurring and appears unpopulated; less suitable than core overhead components.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears unpopulated in preview.
Personnel-related but non-recurring/special item, so not preferred for core SG&A mapping.

variables.notes: No populated explicit SG&A row is available, so selected best overhead component rows and excluded D&A, finance, totals, and non-recurring special items.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; suitable fallback when a specific interest expense row is missing.
Most direct interest expense line and preferred when available.
Finance-related but not specifically interest; weaker fallback.
Finance-related but not specifically interest; weaker fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but only a subset of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Very specific and mostly irrelevant/empty for standard interest expense mapping.
Valid label as fallback if used in some years, though unpopulated in preview.
Supplemental disclosure, not preferred over primary statement lines.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers specific interest expense; falls back to broader finance expense when needed for years where the direct interest row is missing.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit of equity-accounted investees Total financial income and expenses and share
candidates.why: Income statement line, not equity.
Income statement line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Income statement financing line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Asset line, not equity.
Component of equity, but not total owner equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, exactly as required.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so inferior when owner equity is available.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line selected to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interests.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful as fallback if naming changes.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list uses balance sheet NCI labels only.
